Oil prices surge above $110 and shares slide over Iran warMajor disruption to energy supplies threatens to push up prices for consumers and businesses around the world. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c79542n0grwo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c79542n0grwo#1 Mon, 09 Mar 2026 02:19:19 GMT
Who is Mojtaba Khamenei, Iran's new supreme leader? Many expect the 56-year-old, who has largely kept a low profile, to continue his father's hardline policies. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c78xxg05w0zo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c78xxg05w0zo#1 Sun, 08 Mar 2026 21:51:48 GMT
'Night turned into day': Iranians tell of strikes on oil depotsFuel depots were hit in Tehran and Karaj overnight, with videos showing huge fires and plumes of smoke in multiple locations. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/clygpxq41l3o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/clygpxq41l3o#1 Sun, 08 Mar 2026 16:32:57 GMT
In maps: Nine days of strikes across the Middle EastIsrael has continued strikes across Iran and Lebanon and the Iranian regime has carried out more attacks, as the war continues for a ninth day. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c4g0pnnj8xyo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c4g0pnnj8xyo#1 Sun, 08 Mar 2026 15:38:52 GMT
'Mind boggles' at doubts over legality of Iran war, Israeli president saysIsaac Herzog says Israel is acting out of "self-defence" on behalf of Israel, the wider region and Europe. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/clyxp780xvro?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/clyxp780xvro#1 Sun, 08 Mar 2026 16:53:30 GMT
Huge fire at Glasgow Central Station prompts evacuations as building collapsesThe fire is understood to have started in a vape shop on Union Street on Sunday afternoon, with the building collapsing several hours later. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cy8l2wx0027o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cy8l2wx0027o#2 Mon, 09 Mar 2026 00:30:44 GMT
Watch: Fire crews fight blaze near Glasgow Central StationThe dome of a neighbouring building has collapsed as ScotRail says no trains will operate in or out of the station on Monday. https://www.bbc.com/news/videos/c9wne9yxqn8o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/videos/c9wne9yxqn8o#2 Mon, 09 Mar 2026 00:53:54 GMT
Starmer and Trump speak for first time since president's Iran criticism The phone call comes after a week in which Donald Trump repeatedly expressed frustration at Keir Starmer's stance on Iran. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c05v28eqjyvo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c05v28eqjyvo#2 Sun, 08 Mar 2026 16:56:34 GMT
New images could be key to solving mystery of body in wetsuitDetectives hope the new facial reconstruction images will end an 18-month mystery. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cy577wd1xgro?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cy577wd1xgro#2 Sun, 08 Mar 2026 22:00:32 GMT
Rihanna's Beverly Hills home hit by gunfire, police sayA suspect was arrested after the shooting on Sunday afternoon, Los Angeles officers say. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/ckg2pm2kvkeo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/ckg2pm2kvkeo#2 Mon, 09 Mar 2026 03:01:00 GMT
Clumber spaniel named Bruin wins best in show at Crufts 2026Handler Lee Cox said Bruin was the "dog of a lifetime" as he accepted the award. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/crrxp4p8p77o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/crrxp4p8p77o#2 Sun, 08 Mar 2026 22:12:57 GMT
